what_it_does: Defines an SVG outline icon of a document with a folded corner and three horizontal text lines.
observations: Root svg uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill and currentColor stroke.
Stroke styling is set inline with 1.5 width, round line caps, and round line joins.
The document outline, folded corner, and text lines are drawn with path elements.
standouts: The icon inherits color from surrounding text via currentColor.
The drawing uses only path geometry and inline SVG attributes.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions for 24px icons.
Uses semantic file naming consistent with a file-text document icon.
Keeps styling self-contained in the SVG element.
notes: This is a small themeable SVG asset representing a text document.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename and path indicate a file-text icon, and the SVG depicts a text document icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable file/document-with-text icon that can inherit color from the UI context.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting document text icon asset for places that need a file or text-document visual cue.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px inline SVG outline icon showing a document with a folded corner and text lines.
intention_for_embedding: Created as a reusable themeable icon for representing a text file or document in an interface.
